name: basic
description: Verifiable Credentials（VC）の発行・保有・検証を体験できるシンプルなデモシステム

scripts.deploy:docs: npm run build && npm run copy:docs
scripts.copy:docs: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const src='dist', dest='../../docs/basic'; fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});"
